name: sententia
description: Sententia — Swiss legal document generation plugin. Drafts letters, diffide, pareri, and all legal documents on your studio letterhead with cited Swiss legal sources (BGE/DTF, Fedlex, commentaries). Includes an independent review agent for source verification.

template_path.title: Letterhead template path
template_path.description: Absolute path to your studio letterhead Word template (.docx). This file is used as the base for every generated document.

output_folder.title: Output folder path
output_folder.description: Absolute path to the folder where generated documents will be saved. Example: /Users/yourname/Documents/Sententia/output

ollama_host.title: Ollama host URL
ollama_host.description: URL of the Ollama host used by the bundled ollama MCP server for local-only translation and summarisation.

default_jurisdiction.title: Default Swiss canton
default_jurisdiction.description: Default Swiss canton code for cantonal research (e.g. ZH, BE, GE, TI, VD). Leave blank for federal-only queries.

output_language.title: Output language
output_language.description: Preferred output language for agents and documents. One of: DE, FR, IT, EN.

privacy_mode.title: Privacy mode
privacy_mode.description: Privacy routing mode: strict, balanced, or cloud.
